productDisplayName: Clarks Women Un Swish Patent White Sandals
description: Style Note Handcrafted leather goodness for your feet - with love from clarks. This sandal is moulded to Fit your feet to perfection and designed to add an understated polish to your ensemble. Product Details Leather forefoot straps and an ankle loop with a Velcro closure A strap along the midfoot Padded footbed with a heel patch TPU outsole with deep flex grooves and an upraised heel Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner for added shine
